blocker: Create/list/read only; no edit/delete UI -> CLOSED for masters

mastersWithEditAndSoftDelete.note: 5 LLM-proposed catalog entities have full create/list/edit/deactivate xUnit coverage in CatalogGeneratedTests.cs

documentsBehavior: Posted transactional documents are submit/approve/cancel/reverse only; immutable after posting; no hard delete, by design
bugFixed: Empty-string form fields now map to "" for non-nullable string columns (not null) to avoid a NOT-NULL 500
honest: Edit/soft-delete is for mutable masters/catalog only; posted documents immutable by design; manufacturing/HR/POS are CRUD skeletons; some bespoke pages thin.
